package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_hassuffix_manual_slice_after_len: Manual `len` and slice suffix checks instead of `strings.HasSuffix(...)`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario656Positive(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return len(haystack) >= len(needle) && haystack[len(haystack)-len(needle):] == needle
}
